tasks.subject: Task 1: State layer — missions table, mission_id, migration, CRUD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the SQLite schema additions, the Mission dataclass, the CRUD helpers, and the one-shot legacy-archive migration.

**Files:** orchestra/state.py, tests/test_state.py

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/test_state.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/state.py`

See plan Task 1 for the full body.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["orchestra/state.py", "tests/test_state.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/pytest tests/test_state.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/state.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["missions table + index", "mission_id ALTER on workers", "legacy backfill", "fresh DB no legacy row", "idempotent", "Mission dataclass", "CRUD complete", "tests + mypy + ruff green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Mission CLI commands — new/list/show/run
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the `orchestra mission new|list|show|run` surface that uses Task 1's state CRUD.

**Files:** orchestra/missions.py, orchestra/cli.py, tests/test_missions.py, tests/test_cli.py

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/test_missions.py tests/test_cli.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/missions.py orchestra/cli.py`

See plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["orchestra/missions.py", "orchestra/cli.py", "tests/test_missions.py", "tests/test_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/pytest tests/test_missions.py tests/test_cli.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/missions.py orchestra/cli.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mission new scaffolds dir + verifier.sh executable", "slug validation", "collision check (disk + table)", "mission list table; running bold", "mission show 3 blocks", "mission run shortcut + flags"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: orchestra run lifecycle — sequential gate + mission row
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire mission lifecycle into run_mission.

**Files:** orchestra/run.py, orchestra/spawn.py (temp), tests/test_run.py

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/test_run.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/run.py`

See plan Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["orchestra/run.py", "orchestra/spawn.py", "tests/test_run.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/pytest tests/test_run.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/run.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sequential gate blocks", "slug inferred from path; auto with suffix", "mission row inserted before PM", "PM-row preflight scoped", "terminal exit code mapping", "tests + mypy clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Worktree + spawn namespacing, merge/reap lookup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Namespace engineer worktrees + branches by mission slug; merge/reap resolve via worker.mission_id.

**Files:** orchestra/worktree.py, orchestra/spawn.py, orchestra/state.py, orchestra/cli.py, tests/test_worktree.py, tests/test_spawn.py

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/test_worktree.py tests/test_spawn.py tests/test_run.py tests/test_cli.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/state.py orchestra/spawn.py orchestra/worktree.py orchestra/cli.py`

See plan Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["orchestra/worktree.py", "orchestra/spawn.py", "orchestra/state.py", "orchestra/cli.py", "tests/test_worktree.py", "tests/test_spawn.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/pytest tests/test_worktree.py tests/test_spawn.py tests/test_run.py tests/test_cli.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/state.py orchestra/spawn.py orchestra/worktree.py orchestra/cli.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["worktree.add namespaces path+branch", "running-mission fallback when slug None", "create_worker accepts mission_id", "Worker dataclass has mission_id", "spawn passes id+slug; Task 3 hack removed", "_reap and merge resolve via mission_id"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Dashboard mission switcher + /missions page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface missions in the FastAPI dashboard.

**Files:** orchestra/web.py, tests/test_web.py

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/test_web.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/web.py && .venv/bin/ruff check orchestra/web.py tests/test_web.py`

See plan Task 5. NOTE: less prescriptive than other tasks because web.py templating strategy was not read at plan time — match what exists.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["orchestra/web.py", "tests/test_web.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/pytest tests/test_web.py -v && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/web.py && .venv/bin/ruff check orchestra/web.py tests/test_web.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/missions HTML route", "?mission=<slug> filter on workers/events", "default mission resolution: running > most-recent > unfiltered", "top-of-page switcher", "tests pass (install sse-starlette if missing)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Documentation updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reflect new mission workflow across user-facing docs.

**Files:** GETTING_STARTED.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, missions/urlshortener/, missions/kanban/

**Verify:** see plan Task 6 verify block.

See plan Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GETTING_STARTED.md", "CLAUDE.md", "README.md", "CHANGELOG.md", "missions/urlshortener/mission.md", "missions/kanban/"], "verifyCommand": "test -f missions/urlshortener/mission.md && test -d missions/kanban && ! test -f examples/urlshortener-mission.md && ! test -d examples/kanban && grep -q 'orchestra mission new' GETTING_STARTED.md && (grep -q '## Missions' CLAUDE.md || grep -q '### Missions' CLAUDE.md) && grep -q 'orchestra mission new' README.md && (grep -q 'v2.4' CHANGELOG.md || grep -q 'multi-mission' CHANGELOG.md) && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GETTING_STARTED step 4 rewritten", "CLAUDE.md Missions subsection + worktree invariant", "README one-shot-runner updated", "examples moved to missions/", "CHANGELOG v2.4 entry", "no surviving references to old paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: E2E test — two consecutive missions + sequential gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** E2E test exercising two consecutive missions + sequential gate. No real PM spawn.

**Files:** tests/test_multi_mission_e2e.py

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/test_multi_mission_e2e.py -v && .venv/bin/pytest -v --ignore=tests/test_web.py && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/state.py orchestra/tmux.py && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/ && .venv/bin/ruff check orchestra/ tests/`

See plan Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_multi_mission_e2e.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/pytest tests/test_multi_mission_e2e.py -v && .venv/bin/pytest -v --ignore=tests/test_web.py && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/state.py orchestra/tmux.py && .venv/bin/mypy orchestra/ && .venv/bin/ruff check orchestra/ tests/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["two runs both return 0", "both mission rows status=done", "no running mission after", "sequential gate exit 2", "no worktree leakage", "full suite green"]}
```
